creator: exploringlondon
caption: Is this the coolest shop in the UK? It allows gravity to decide the price 🤣⚖️ You can get so much here for such an affordable price, and the quality is amazing! This is @mondego_outlet in Leeds and we took an @lner direct to Leeds from London King’s Cross and it was soooo worth it 🤩

transcription.text: Okay guys, this might just be the coolest shop in the whole of the UK. It's a ceramic shop where you pay whatever the item weighs. It's called Mondego Outlet and it's a Portuguese stoneware ceramic outlet in Leeds and everything is £5.50 per kilo. I'll put the full address at the end of the video. The place is massive and they have so much you can choose from, from plates to bowls to cups, whether you like it plain or coloured. There's literally something here for everyone. They also have a whole section for towels which is also paid by weight and again there are so many options and they're all 100% cotton. And there's also a cafe on site so you can grab some food after your shopping. Guys, it is worth a trip from London to Leeds just to go here. You can take an LNER train directly from London King's Cross and the address is on screen now. Share this with someone who would love to go.
